message.content:
Let me write the fix to a file first, then run it:

```json
{
  "analysis": "The -c flag has quoting issues with complex strings. Let me write a fixer script to a file first, then execute it.",
  "plan": "Write a fix.py script that reads gen.py, makes all needed changes, and writes back. Avoid heredoc issues entirely.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "echo 'import sys' > /tmp/fix.py\n", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "echo 'NL = chr(10)' >> /tmp/fix.py\n", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "echo 'BS = chr(92)' >> /tmp/fix.py\n", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "echo \"with open('/app/gen.py') as f:\" >> /tmp/fix.py\n", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "echo '    c = f.read()' >> /tmp/fix.py\n", "duration": 0.1}
  ]
}
```
